# Badge

A small label component used to display status, categories, or counts.

## Import

```jsx
import { Badge } from "@onlinesales-ai/ui";
```

## Props

| Prop | Type | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `variant` | `"solid" \| "subtle" \| "surface" \| "outline" \| "plain"` | `"subtle"` | The visual style variant of the badge. |
| `colorPalette` | `string` | `"gray"` | The color palette for the badge. |
| `size` | `"xs" \| "sm" \| "md" \| "lg"` | `"sm"` | The size of the badge. |

## Usage

### Basic Badge

```jsx
<Badge>Default</Badge>
```

### Badge Variants

```jsx
<Badge variant="solid" colorPalette="green">Active</Badge>
<Badge variant="subtle" colorPalette="blue">New</Badge>
<Badge variant="surface" colorPalette="red">Error</Badge>
<Badge variant="outline" colorPalette="purple">Beta</Badge>
<Badge variant="plain">Plain</Badge>
```

### Badge Sizes

```jsx
<Badge size="xs">Tiny</Badge>
<Badge size="sm">Small</Badge>
<Badge size="md">Medium</Badge>
<Badge size="lg">Large</Badge>
```
